title: Effector
description: Base ascription schema for Effector ElementDefinitions. An Effector is an output port of a Mechanism, derived by the definition-manager from the Mechanism operation's AST. It references the owning Mechanism and the Artifact definition that types the emitted data. Tenant-defined archetypes MUST NOT extend Effector.

mechanismId.description: Identifier of the owning Mechanism (typically the Mechanism ElementDefinition's elementId).

artifactId.description: Identifier of the Artifact ElementDefinition that types the Effector's output payload.

interfaceId.description: Optional identifier of the Interface ElementDefinition that exposes this Effector for inter-Structure coupling. Null means the port is private to the Structure.
